query:
SELECT 
  accountName,
  COUNT(*) as txnCount,
  MIN(transactionDate) as earliestDate,
  MAX(transactionDate) as latestDate,
  locationId
FROM bankTransactions
GROUP BY accountName, locationId
ORDER BY accountName
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4hPncfDS8MBAb.82b03a6e50f8 --database h46y7gAGiyBszkHNcCdSHx --execute SELECT 
  accountName,
  COUNT(*) as txnCount,
  MIN(transactionDate) as earliestDate,
  MAX(transactionDate) as latestDate,
  locationId
FROM bankTransactions
GROUP BY accountName, locationId
ORDER BY accountName
